authLoading.title: Checking access
authLoading.description: Loading the current password protection status.

gate.title: Unlock Foldergram
gate.descriptionPassword: This library accepts either the admin password or the viewer password for local access.
gate.descriptionAdmin: This library is protected with the admin password for local and homelab access.
gate.placeholderPassword: Enter the admin or viewer password

adminUnlock.title: Unlock admin access
adminUnlock.description: Enter the admin password to open Settings, Trash, scans, rebuild tools, and other admin-only actions.

settings.title: Library Controls
settings.description: Manage scans, app defaults, access, and the library index.

library.label: Scan & Library
library.description: Index media, rebuild thumbnails, and maintain the library index

general.label: General Settings
general.description: Stories mode, excluded folders, and feed defaults

places.label: Places
places.description: Offline city lookup and place assignment

banner.title: Places from photo GPS data
banner.description: Group GPS-tagged photos by offline city and location labels.
banner.helper: Prepare the local GeoNames dataset, then rebuild place assignments for the photos already in your library.
banner.availableLater: The download is opt-in, and the Places tab stays available in Settings later.

section.title: Offline places
section.description: Prepare GeoNames city data, then rebuild place links from existing photo coordinates.

actions.prepareError: Unable to prepare offline place data.

migration.title: This library may already use folders named stories
migration.description: Foldergram can now treat stories/ as profile stories and highlights by default. Choose whether to keep legacy folder behavior or switch to the new reserved stories mode, then rescan the library.
migration.helper: Choose a mode here, then save it below. Run a library scan afterward so the indexed folder structure matches.
migration.helperSaving: Wait for the current settings update to finish first.

announcement.title: Stories
announcement.headline: Reserved stories/ folders can power App Folder stories
announcement.description: Drop direct media into AppFolder/stories for the avatar story set, and use direct child folders for highlight circles. Nested folders stay inside the same highlight capsule.

card.title: General Settings
card.description: App-wide defaults for stories folders, excluded folders, Home, Reels, and app folders.

language.label: App language
language.description: Choose the language used for navigation, dialogs, and other translated app UI on this device.
language.helper: Applies immediately in this browser. Missing translations fall back to English.

homeFeed.label: Home feed sort order
homeFeed.description: Choose the first feed mode shown on Home.

reelsFeed.label: Reels feed sort order
reelsFeed.description: Choose the default queue style when Reels opens.

folderOrder.label: App folder photo order
folderOrder.description: Choose the default order for photos inside app folders.
folderOrder.closeMenuAria: Close app folder photo order menu

storiesMode.label: Treat stories folders as normal app folders
storiesMode.explainDescription: When this stays off, AppFolder/stories becomes the source for avatar stories and highlight circles. Turn it on only if folders literally named stories should continue behaving like normal folders everywhere in the app.
storiesMode.enabledDescription: Legacy mode is enabled. stories folders remain ordinary app folders everywhere.
storiesMode.disabledDescription: Reserved stories mode is enabled. AppFolder/stories powers avatar stories and highlight circles.

excludedFolders.label: Excluded source folders
excludedFolders.description: Skip matching folders anywhere by name or by exact relative path under the gallery root. Hidden paths and app-managed storage stay excluded automatically.
excludedFolders.envRulesDescription: Change GALLERY_EXCLUDED_FOLDERS in .env or Docker and restart the app to update these.
excludedFolders.envRulesEmpty: No env-backed folder exclusions are configured.
excludedFolders.activeRulesDescription: This combines the saved textarea rules with any env-backed entries. New textarea edits appear here after you save them.
excludedFolders.activeRulesEmpty: No saved custom or env-backed folder exclusions are active.

actionNote.excludedAndOther: Save the folder exclusion rules with the other app-wide changes. Run a library scan afterward so stories and excluded folders reindex correctly.
actionNote.excludedOnly: This saves the custom excluded folders only. Run a library scan afterward so those folders disappear from the index.
actionNote.storiesAndDefaults: Save the new stories rule and the updated browsing defaults together.
actionNote.storiesOnly: This saves the stories folders rule only. Run a library scan afterward to reindex with the new behavior.
actionNote.multipleDefaults: Save these browsing defaults together. Home visitors can still switch modes on the homepage; Reels and app folders use app defaults.
actionNote.homeOnly: This updates the first feed mode shown on Home for this app. Visitors can still switch modes from the homepage.
actionNote.reelsOnly: This updates the queue style used when Reels opens for this app. Visitors cannot switch modes from the reels page.
actionNote.folderOnly: This updates the default photo order used by app folder grids.
actionNote.idle: These are the current app-wide defaults for Home, Reels, app folders, stories folders, and excluded folders.

rescanNotice.excludedAndStories: Save these changes, then run a library scan before expecting stories folders and excluded folders to update.
rescanNotice.excludedOnly: Save this change, then run a library scan before excluded folders disappear from the index.
rescanNotice.storiesOnly: Save this change, then run a library scan before expecting stories folders, avatar stories, or highlights to update.

feedback.settingsAndFolderRulesSaved: Settings were saved. Run a library scan to apply the folder rule changes.
feedback.folderRulesAndStoriesSaved: Folder exclusion rules and stories folder behavior were saved. Run a library scan to apply them.
feedback.excludedFoldersSaved: Excluded folders were saved. Run a library scan to apply them.
feedback.settingsAndStoriesSaved: Settings were saved. Run a library scan to apply the stories folder change.
feedback.storiesSaved: Stories folder behavior was saved. Run a library scan to apply it.

errors.validateExcludedFolders: Unable to validate the excluded folder rules.
errors.update: Unable to update the general settings.
errors.partialUpdate: Some settings were saved ({parts}), but the update did not finish: {message}

legacyMigration.title: Legacy derivative migration pending
legacyMigration.messageOne: {count} indexed media record still uses the old mirrored thumbnail and preview paths. Run Scan Library to move it into asset-key storage.
legacyMigration.messageOther: {count} indexed media records still use the old mirrored thumbnail and preview paths. Run Scan Library to move them into asset-key storage.

scanCard.title: Scan Library
scanCard.description: Run a scan after adding folders or when you want to refresh indexed media.

scanActionNote.rebuildRequired: Rebuild the library index first because the gallery location changed.
scanActionNote.otherTaskActive: Another library task is running. Live progress appears in the sticky status bar.
scanActionNote.progress: Live progress appears in the sticky status bar.
scanActionNote.legacyMigration: Run Scan Library to move legacy mirrored thumbnails and previews into the asset-key storage layout.
scanActionNote.idle: Scans check for added, updated, or missing media.

thumbnailCard.title: Regenerate Thumbnails
thumbnailCard.description: Rebuild feed and profile thumbnails plus video posters from indexed media only. Original files are not affected.

thumbnailActionNote.rebuildRequired: Unavailable until the library index is rebuilt for the new gallery location.
thumbnailActionNote.progress: Live progress appears in the sticky status bar.
thumbnailActionNote.rebuildActive: Wait for the full rebuild to finish first.
thumbnailActionNote.scanActive: Wait for the current scan to finish first.
thumbnailActionNote.legacyMigration: This keeps the current thumbnail paths and does not migrate legacy mirrored derivatives. Run Scan Library instead to move them into asset-key storage.
thumbnailActionNote.idle: Use this for a faster thumbnail-only refresh.

dangerZone.title: Danger Zone
dangerZone.rebuildDescription: Reset the library index, reuse matching cached media, and generate only missing derivatives from the current gallery root.

rebuildActionNote.progress: Live progress appears in the sticky status bar.
rebuildActionNote.thumbnailActive: Wait for thumbnail regeneration to finish first.
rebuildActionNote.scanActive: Wait for the current scan to finish first.
rebuildActionNote.rebuildRequired: Recommended because the gallery location changed.
rebuildActionNote.idle: Use this to reset the index and reuse matching derivatives from the previous library index.

dialogs.rebuildMessage: This will clear the indexed database tables for folders, posts, likes, and scan history, then rescan the active gallery root. Existing thumbnails and previews from the previous index will be reused when they still match the current files, and only missing or changed derivatives will be generated. Original files in the gallery will not be deleted.
dialogs.thumbnailsMessage: This will remove generated feed and profile thumbnails plus video poster images, then rebuild them from the current indexed library using each item's current thumbnail path. Previews, likes, scan history, and indexed library records will not be changed. Original files in the gallery will not be deleted.

errors.startScan: Unable to start a library scan.
errors.rebuild: Unable to rebuild the current library index.

scanError.title: The last scan completed with errors
scanError.actionNote: Run a new library scan to retry failed media and fill in any missing thumbnails or previews.

messages.genericNoDetails: Some media failed during the last run. Scan the library again to retry any missed files and derivative generation.
messages.ffmpegMissing: Video processing tools are missing from the server environment. Install FFmpeg so scans can read video metadata and generate video derivatives.
messages.withReport: Some media failed during the last run. Review the sample error and full report path below, then scan the library again to retry failed media and derivative generation.
messages.withSample: Some media failed during the last run. Review the sample error below, then scan the library again to retry any missed files and derivative generation.

ignoredRootMedia.messageOne: {count} supported file is being ignored in the gallery root. Move it into a folder inside your gallery root to create App Folders. Files placed directly in the gallery root are ignored.
ignoredRootMedia.messageOther: {count} supported files are being ignored in the gallery root. Move them into a folder inside your gallery root to create App Folders. Files placed directly in the gallery root are ignored.

section.title: Admin and viewer access
section.description: Protect admin actions with an admin password, then optionally issue a separate viewer password for browsing-only sessions.

enable.description: The admin password is stored as a one-way hash and unlocks this browser with a signed session cookie.
enable.success: The admin password is now enabled for this Foldergram instance.
enable.error: Unable to enable the admin password.

change.title: Change admin password
change.description: Update the admin password and invalidate older sessions.
change.helper: Use at least 8 characters. Changing the password signs out any older sessions.
change.missingCurrent: Enter the current password to change it.
change.success: The admin password was updated and existing sessions were invalidated.
change.error: Unable to change the admin password.

viewer.title: Viewer access
viewer.description: Issue a browsing-only password for viewer sessions or open the library for anonymous public viewing.

modes.adminOnlyDescription: Only the admin password can unlock the app.
modes.viewerPasswordDescription: Allow a separate viewer login that can browse and use shared likes without seeing admin controls.
modes.publicDescription: Allow anonymous browsing with browser-local favorites while keeping admin unlock available from More.

summaryCopy.enableAdminFirst: Viewer access settings become available after the admin password is enabled.
summaryCopy.viewerPasswordEnabled: Viewers can sign in with the separate viewer password, use shared likes, and browse without admin controls. To replace that password, enter a new one below. The current viewer password is not required.
summaryCopy.publicEnabled: Anyone who can reach this Foldergram can browse without logging in. Favorites stay in the current browser only, and admins can elevate from More with the admin password.
summaryCopy.off: Only the admin password can unlock the app right now. Turn on viewer password mode below if you want a browsing-only login.

helper.viewerPasswordRotate: Enter a new viewer password below to rotate it. You do not need the current viewer password.
helper.viewerPasswordNew: Viewer logins get shared likes but cannot reach Settings, Trash, or any destructive action.
helper.public: Anonymous visitors can browse immediately, use browser-local favorites, and unlock admin access from More when needed.
helper.disableFromPassword: Saving this will turn off viewer logins and return the app to admin-only access.
helper.disableFromPublic: Saving this will disable public browsing and return the app to admin-only access.
helper.off: Viewer access is currently off, so only the admin password can unlock the app.

success.password: Viewer password access is enabled. The viewer password was saved.
success.public: Public viewer access is enabled. Anonymous visitors can now browse with browser-local favorites.
success.off: Viewer access has been turned off. Only admin logins are allowed now.

danger.title: Danger Zone
danger.disableDescription: Turn the admin password back off for this Foldergram instance.
danger.missingCurrent: Enter the current password to disable protection.
danger.success: The admin password has been disabled.
danger.error: Unable to disable the admin password.

authProtection.enabled: Admin protection is active for this browser session. Use the controls below to rotate the admin password, configure viewer access, sign out, or turn protection off again.
authProtection.disabled: Protection is currently off. Anyone who can reach this app on your network can browse the library with full local access until you enable an admin password.

validation.minLength: Password must be at least {count} characters.
validation.mismatch: The password confirmation does not match.

lastScan.title: Last Scan
lastScan.description: Most recent completed run tracked by the app.

view.rebuilding: Rebuilding the library index. {label} will return after the refreshed library finishes loading.

states.sharedEmptyDescription: Tap the heart under any post and it will appear here.
states.localEmptyDescription: Tap the heart under any post and it will appear here in this browser.

moments.title: Moments
moments.description: Memory capsules shaped by real capture dates from your library.

highlights.title: Stories
highlights.description: Curated story-style sets from your library when capture dates are sparse or synthetic.

highlightRecentBatches.title: Recent Batches
highlightRecentBatches.subtitle: Latest runs gathered into one set

highlightForgottenFavorites.title: Forgotten Favorites
highlightForgottenFavorites.subtitle: Older liked posts worth another look

highlightDeepCuts.title: Deep Cuts
highlightDeepCuts.subtitle: Older posts resurfaced from the archive

highlightLuckyDip.title: Lucky Dip
highlightLuckyDip.subtitle: A playful mix from across the library

view.rebuilding: Rebuilding the library index. This view will repopulate when the refreshed home rail is ready.

profileModal.title: Edit App Folder
profileModal.descriptionPlaceholder: Add a description to this folder...

view.loadingDescription: Pulling together a video-only queue from your indexed library.
view.emptyDescription: Add indexed videos to your library and they will show up here after the next scan.

delete.title: Delete this post?
delete.messagePermanent: This will permanently delete the post from the app and remove original media from disk.
delete.messageTrash: This will delete the post from the app and move it to Trash. The original file will stay on disk unless you choose permanent deletion.
delete.deleteOriginalLabel: Also permanently delete original file from disk
delete.deleteOriginalDescription: Keep this unchecked to move the post to Trash while keeping the source file on disk.
delete.deleteOriginalWarning: This will permanently delete the original file, thumbnail, and preview from disk. This action cannot be undone.

list.emptyDescription: Saved posts will appear in All Posts.

detail.emptyDescriptionDefault: Use the bookmark action under any post to save it here.
detail.emptyDescriptionCustom: Bookmarked posts assigned to this collection will appear here.

delete.title: Delete collection?
delete.message: When you delete this collection, the photos and videos will still be saved.

placesPage.title: All places
placesPage.description: Browse posts grouped from offline location data.
placesPage.emptyDescription: Prepare offline place data and rebuild assignments from Settings to group posts by location.
placesPage.noMatch: No places match. Try a different search or sort.

placePage.emptyDescription: Place assignments can be rebuilt from Settings after offline place data is prepared.
placePage.heroApproximate: Grouped from stored photo GPS coordinates and matched to the nearest city for offline browsing.
placePage.heroExact: Resolved from stored photo GPS coordinates and kept available offline.

libraryPage.title: All folders
libraryPage.description: Browse and search every indexed app folder.
libraryPage.emptyDescription: Add media-containing source folders under the gallery root and run a scan.
libraryPage.noMatch: No folders match. Try a different search or filter.

delete.title: Delete this app folder?
delete.sourceTooNoChildren: Also remove the source folder itself instead of only deleting its direct posts.
delete.sourceTooWithChildrenOne: Also remove {count} child app folder and every file inside the subtree.
delete.sourceTooWithChildrenOther: Also remove {count} child app folders and every file inside the subtree.
delete.warning: Doing this will permanently delete the selected source folder and every child folder and file inside it, including unsupported files. This action cannot be undone.
delete.messageDeleteSource: This will permanently delete {directPosts} and remove this source folder from the hard drive.
delete.messageKeepChildren: This will permanently delete {directPosts}. {childFolders} will be kept.
delete.messageEmptyFolder: This will permanently delete {directPosts}. The source folder itself will only be removed if it becomes empty.
delete.error: Unable to delete this app folder.

explore.emptySearchDescription: Try a different filename or folder keyword.
explore.emptyDescription: Index a few folders and this page will start surfacing posts here.
